name: Tunasaurus Crunch Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 lb (4 medium) potatoes - cut into 1/2-inch cubes
2 cans Tuna packed in water - (6 1/8 ounces each, thoroughly drained)
1 can Cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Place potatoes in a shallow 1 1/2- to 2-quart microwave-safe dish. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 8 minutes until just tender.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients (except potato chips) into the potatoes.
5. Spoon the mixture into a shallow 2-quart baking dish and spread evenly.
6. Cover with crushed potato chips.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes, or until the mixture is bubbly and the chips are lightly browned.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt microwave. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
